mnemonics: O-X-F-O-R-D: Optimize X Features for Optimal Results Daily (encapsulates the iterative, feature-focused nature of ML model tuning presented in the module)
keyPoints: Feature Engineering is crucial for model performance
Cross-validation prevents overfitting and ensures generalizability
commonMistakes: Tuning hyperparameters on the entire dataset instead of using a validation set
Not scaling features before applying regularization or distance-based algorithms
Using accuracy as the sole metric for imbalanced classification problems
